items.title: Data cleaning before supervised learning
items.description: Tabular ML pipelines flag impossible or corrupted measurements (negative ages, 999 placeholders) with IQR or domain rules, then remove or impute so models train on plausible inputs.

items.title: Financial risk and fraud
items.description: Extreme transaction sizes or velocities are often the signal of interest; teams use robust models or separate anomaly detectors instead of deleting all statistical outliers.

items.title: Sensor and IoT monitoring
items.description: Spike detection on streaming metrics prevents bad readings from polluting dashboards and downstream alerts; clipping or imputation smooths series without dropping entire devices.

items.title: Survey and rating normalization
items.description: Winsorizing response times or purchase amounts before aggregation prevents a few bots or power users from skewing cohort averages and A/B test conclusions.
